workloads.name: render draw throughput
workloads.description: Native render/draw throughput workload aligned to Dawn DrawCallPerf base variant.
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Both sides execute DrawCallPerf-style draw-call throughput against a 64x64 render target with static pipeline and bind-group defaults.

timingNormalization.note: Dawn DrawCallPerf reports per draw (iterationsPerStep=2000); Fawn render_draw normalizes to per-draw units.

reasons: p50Percent=-460.755085 is not positive (positive means left faster)
p95Percent=-503.815958 is not positive (positive means left faster)
p99Percent=-503.815958 is not positive (positive means left faster)

workloads.name: render draw state/bindings
workloads.description: Render-pass state and bind-group benchmark using explicit viewport/scissor/blend/stencil + dynamic bind offsets.
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Mapped to Dawn DrawCallPerf DynamicBindGroup variant with per-draw normalization.

timingNormalization.note: Dawn DrawCallPerf DynamicBindGroup reports per draw (iterationsPerStep=2000); Fawn command stream normalizes to per-draw units.

reasons: p50Percent=-207.095854 is not positive (positive means left faster)
p95Percent=-210.751593 is not positive (positive means left faster)
p99Percent=-210.751593 is not positive (positive means left faster)

workloads.name: render redundant pipeline/bindings
workloads.description: Render workload that intentionally rebinds pipeline and bind groups every draw.
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Mapped to Dawn DrawCallPerf RedundantPipeline_RedundantBindGroups variant with per-draw normalization.

timingNormalization.note: Dawn DrawCallPerf redundant-pipeline variant reports per draw (iterationsPerStep=2000); Fawn normalizes to per-draw units.

reasons: p50Percent=-160.649223 is not positive (positive means left faster)
p95Percent=-228.280758 is not positive (positive means left faster)
p99Percent=-228.280758 is not positive (positive means left faster)

workloads.name: render bundle dynamic bindings
workloads.description: Render-bundle workload with dynamic bind-group offsets.
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Mapped to Dawn DrawCallPerf DynamicBindGroup_RenderBundle variant with per-draw normalization.

timingNormalization.note: Dawn DrawCallPerf render-bundle variant reports per draw (iterationsPerStep=2000); Fawn normalizes to per-draw units.

reasons: p50Percent=-412.581353 is not positive (positive means left faster)
p95Percent=-582.356456 is not positive (positive means left faster)
p99Percent=-582.356456 is not positive (positive means left faster)

workloads.name: render bundle dynamic pipeline+bindings
workloads.description: Render-bundle workload with dynamic pipeline and dynamic bind-group updates.
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Mapped to Dawn DrawCallPerf DynamicPipeline_DynamicBindGroup_RenderBundle variant with per-draw normalization.

timingNormalization.note: Dawn DrawCallPerf dynamic-pipeline render-bundle variant reports per draw (iterationsPerStep=2000); Fawn normalizes to per-draw units.
